title: Songs of Conquest Mobile App Store Page
notes: Primary mobile source for iOS availability, publisher listing, category, device requirements, App Store description, and mobile-facing feature claims. Use player reviews only as neutral pain-point discovery, not as production fact, ratings evidence, or quoted guide material.

title: Songs of Conquest Mobile Google Play Page
notes: Primary mobile source for Android availability, Coffee Stain Publishing listing, update date, store tags, and mobile-facing feature claims. Use reviews only to identify guide questions such as touch targeting, large-map sessions, or onboarding friction; do not publish review sentiment or consensus.

title: Songs of Conquest Official Website
notes: Official game site. Use for broad game identity, Wielders, adventure strategy framing, empire building, resource management, combat concepts, faction names, platform availability links, and official feature descriptions. Do not use official images, screenshots, logos, or press assets in production UI unless rights are separately cleared.

title: Songs of Conquest Steam Store Page
notes: Use only as a PC/desktop baseline source for broad genre, developer/publisher, and high-level feature framing. Do not use Steam-only content, DLC state, PC controls, workshop, multiplayer, balance, or patch assumptions as mobile production facts without mobile verification.

title: Lavapotion Official Website
notes: Official developer site. Use for developer identity and confirmation that Songs of Conquest is Lavapotion's first title and is available on major platforms. Do not use this source for mechanics, mobile-specific functionality, or guide conclusions.

title: Songs of Conquest Community Database
notes: Use for cross-checking buildings, factions, units, skills, spells, Wielders, artifacts, and other reference terms. Treat exact values and PC-derived entries as requiring mobile verification before strong production claims.

title: Songs of Conquest Wiki: The Essence
notes: Use for Essence system vocabulary and basic spell-resource framing. Treat exact spell interactions and mobile parity as requiring mobile build verification.

title: Songs of Conquest Wiki: Wielders
notes: Use for Wielder role vocabulary and broad army/spell relationship framing. Do not use for exact build rankings or strongest Wielder claims.

title: Songs of Conquest Wiki: Resources
notes: Use for resource names and broad use cases. Do not publish exact mobile economy routes, resource thresholds, or build orders without mobile testing.

title: Songs of Conquest Wiki: Factions
notes: Use for faction vocabulary and base faction context. Keep DLC faction availability separate from mobile-confirmed content unless official mobile sources confirm it.

title: Songs of Conquest Official Changelogs
notes: Use for official version-history context. Do not assume PC changelog balance, editor, multiplayer, or DLC state applies to mobile without mobile-specific confirmation.
